title: Federal Reserve officials reiterate data-dependent policy path after firm core inflation print
summary: Officials highlighted elevated core inflation and signaled that policy rate decisions remain conditional on incoming CPI and labor market data.

title: IMF flags uneven global growth and rising downside risks from tighter financial conditions
summary: The update cites growth slowdown risk in Europe and emerging markets, with credit spreads and funding costs remaining sensitive.

title: World Bank notes energy shock vulnerability for import-dependent economies
summary: Oil supply uncertainty and LNG bottlenecks may raise inflation pressures and external financing stress.

title: ECB communication emphasizes cautious stance as euro area inflation remains above target
summary: Policy guidance noted persistent services inflation and uncertainty around the speed of disinflation.

title: Geopolitical conflict concerns push investors toward safe havens as sanctions debate intensifies
summary: Markets monitored conflict escalation headlines, with renewed worries around commodity supply and volatility.

title: New export controls proposal raises trade policy uncertainty across technology supply chains
summary: Proposed regulation could alter cross-border manufacturing and compliance costs, especially for semiconductor exposure.

title: Regional banks face renewed funding stress as deposit migration accelerates
summary: Analysts point to banking liquidity pressure, wider credit spreads, and elevated balance sheet sensitivity.

title: IMF commentary warns inflation progress remains vulnerable to commodity and shipping shocks
summary: The note highlights commodity pass-through effects and policy trade-offs for central banks.

title: Emerging markets face tighter external financing conditions amid stronger dollar trend
summary: Currency and rates volatility increase refinancing risk and may constrain growth in vulnerable economies.

title: OPEC supply language keeps oil market on edge as traders price potential disruptions
summary: Oil supply and pipeline security concerns have become a key macro theme for inflation expectations.

title: Federal Reserve minutes discuss balance sheet normalization and liquidity monitoring
summary: Minutes referenced funding conditions, credit channels, and potential spillovers to rates volatility.

title: ECB economists point to weak manufacturing momentum and recession tail risks
summary: Growth slowdown remains concentrated in trade-sensitive sectors with fragile external demand.
